codeReview.summary: Pass on current branch state. The previously blocking seam issue is resolved: Popover's `testTriggerSelectAndSwitch` no longer no-ops when in-memory profiles are stale, and both Dashboard/Popover rendered-indicator test seams now fall back to store-backed reads, making UI-driven cross-surface assertions deterministic in test context.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `switcher-ui-worker` procedure compliance remains overstated for this worker handoff: it reports `followedProcedure=true` without required manual UI sanity-check evidence and without explicit context-read evidence entries.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff `2026-04-10T14-44-44-032Z__integration-hardening-fix-ui-action-seam-sync-for-crossflow-tests__6e073f26-ef8c-4cf6-aaa3-d4e5cf6c9d65.json` has `verification.interactiveChecks: []` while `.factory/skills/switcher-ui-worker/SKILL.md` step 7 requires manual UI sanity checks and handoff-discipline section requires context-read evidence when claiming `followedProcedure=true`.

summary: Reviewed mission artifacts, prior failed review content, worker transcript skeleton, handoff, skill requirements, and current branch code state. Since round-10 failure, `PopoverQuickSwitchView.testTriggerSelectAndSwitch` now persists active state before optional in-memory lookup (AgentLens/Views/Popover/PopoverQuickSwitchView.swift:762-773), and both quick-switch views now provide store-backed fallback for rendered active indicator seams (Dashboard:876-904, Popover:807-835), resolving the previously reported blocking seam reliability gaps.
